title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Continue, Cancel
scenario: Guest user can navigate from Support via hamburger menu to Login dialog with Cancel/Continue buttons and return to Support section via Cancel
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding as a Guest user.
2. On the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu (three-line icon) in the top-left corner.
4. In the Support section, tap the App button.
6. Observe the login dialog that appears.
7. Tap Continue on the login dialog.
8. Observe that the login page opens.
9. Navigate back to the Support section.
10. Tap the App button, then tap Login again.
11. On the login dialog, tap Cancel (upper-left corner).
expected: Tapping Continue opens the login page. Tapping Cancel (upper-left corner) returns the user to the Poly Support App section with the Later/Login modal still present.
